title: Dirty Hands
writer: Jacques-Laurent Bost, Fernand Rivers, Jean-Paul Sartre
actors: Pierre Brasseur, Daniel Gélin, Claude Nollier
plot: A young intellectual, Hugo, joins the Communist Party out of a sense of idealism, only to see his principles manipulated by party leaders. He is given the assignment of killing Professor Hoederer, a party deviationist. However, he...
